loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Showing aggregate panel readings from 6 active outgoing feeders (GIC-01-N3-UPS-01, GIC-01-N4-UPS-02, GIC-01-N5-UPS-03, GIC-01-N8-BPDB-01, GIC-02-N2-BPDB-02, GIC-02-N5-UPS-04); 2 feeders (GIC-02-N6-UPS-05, GIC-02-N7-UPS-06) are dark and omitted from the aggregate.

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing live power distribution for active feeders (UPS, BPDB, Solar Incomers). UPS-05 and UPS-06 are dark (no data). Load % is omitted because no rated_kva is available for these GIC meters.

loop1.title: Quick Stats
loop1.note: Showing per-phase Voltage, Current Unbalance, and Total Current for the 6 active outgoing feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and honest-blanked.
